title: Fermented Spring Rolls
description: Light and refreshing Filipino-inspired fermented spring rolls, featuring turmeric yellow food coloring for an extra vibrant touch, and a hint of namul-blanch-season for added depth. Served with a side of sweet chili sauce for dipping.

ingredients.name: Fermented cabbage
ingredients.notes: Fermented for 24 hours with salt and spices.

instructions: Combine rice noodles, fermented cabbage, yellow food coloring, and namul-blanch-season in a bowl.
Mix well until the ingredients are evenly distributed.
Heat a tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saut5e until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and chopped chili pepper and saut5e for another minute.
Add the prepared rice noodle mixture to the pan and stir-fry until heated through.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter and garnish with additional chopped onion and chili pepper, if desired.
